compressed_regions.summary: Multiple feature pairs show near-perfect pairwise correlations (several exactly 1.0, one at 0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies among packet-size, segment-size, subflow, and flag-count features.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: e13-e22 report correlation metrics across these pairs

supporting_patterns: correlation ≈ 0.9993 (packet length mean / average packet size)
contextual_modifiers: observations derived from pairwise redundancy metrics
pairs span forward/backward, packet/segment, and subflow counters
uncertainty_notes: Perfect correlation may reflect deterministic derivation or duplicate features rather than measurement noise
Impact of duplicated rows (e1) on computed correlations is not resolved

compressed_regions.summary: A set of bulk-rate and several flag/count features are effectively constant across the partition (unique_values = 1, very low cardinality ratio).

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags|CWE Flag Count|Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags
notes: e23-e32 report unique_values=1 and cardinality_ratio=1e-05 for these features

contextual_modifiers: consistent across forward/backward and bulk-related features
may reflect constant default values or lack of measurement
uncertainty_notes: Low cardinality could be due to deliberate encoding, missing-value sentinel, or genuine lack of variation
Small cardinality ratio noted without per-class breakdown in these evidences

compressed_regions.summary: Several packet-size and segment-size metrics plus destination port show strong class-conditioned distributional differences (high variance ratios, unequal unique_values_by_class, and high JS divergence for port distributions).

locality.scope_value: Average Packet Size|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Destination Port
notes: e33 reports class-conditioned distribution metrics for Destination Port

supporting_patterns: Destination Port shows DDoS dominant_ratio=1.0 and js_divergence=0.7315
contextual_modifiers: features appear in top_feature_rank positions (e3-e7 reference these top features)
class-conditioned counts vary widely across features
uncertainty_notes: Variance_ratio magnitudes depend on sample sizes and may be inflated by small DDoS sample unique_value counts
Distributional metrics may be affected by duplicated rows (e1) or sampling

compressed_regions.summary: Partition-level metadata: non-negligible duplicated rows, mild class imbalance, and a small ranked set of top features identified in the overview.
contextual_modifiers: top-feature ranks reference features that also appear in redundancy and representation-sensitive regions
uncertainty_notes: Duplicate rows may bias top-feature ranks and distributional counts
Class imbalance is moderate but may interact with per-class unique value counts

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Average Packet Size appears frequently in feature lists and shows class-conditioned variance metrics.

notes: e7 (top rank) and e8 (variance_ratio) reference this feature

preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Repeated presence in top_feature_rank and distributional evidence suggests representational importance in overview.
contextual_modifiers: frequency in overview may reflect ranking heuristic
uncertainty_notes: Prominence could be influenced by duplicated rows or ranking methodology

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Presence of 729 duplicated rows in the partition.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Duplicate rows can affect summary statistics, correlation computations, and unique-value counts; preserved for structural caution.
uncertainty_notes: Unknown whether duplicates are identical flows, logging artifacts, or expected repeated records

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Destination Port shows high divergence between BENIGN and DDoS distributions (DDoS dominant_ratio=1.0, js_divergence~0.7315).
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Strong class-conditioned distributional signal preserved as it may reflect concentrated port usage in one class.
contextual_modifiers: JS divergence and per-class dominant ratios reported
uncertainty_notes: Dominant_ratio could reflect small DDoS sample focusing on a single port or labeling artifacts

unresolved_tensions.description: Apparent strong feature redundancy (near-perfect correlations) coexists with features that exhibit strong class-conditioned representation differences; the relation between redundancy and representational signal is unresolved.
context_notes: Redundancy evidences are pairwise correlations across many size/segment/subflow features (e13-e22).
Representation-sensitive evidences show variance_ratio and distributional class differences (e8-e12, e33).
unresolved_tensions.reason_unresolved: Determining whether redundancy masks or duplicates class-differentiating signals requires deeper per-class dependency analysis not present in the overview.

unresolved_tensions.description: A group of features is effectively constant (unique_values=1) while other related features show high class-conditioned variance; unclear if constants are genuine signals, defaults, or measurement artifacts.
context_notes: Low-diversity evidences (e23-e32) report unique_values=1 for bulk-rate and some flag/count features.
Representation-sensitive evidences (e8-e12) record strong variance_ratio for packet/segment metrics.
Redundancy evidences (e13,e16, etc.) show derived relationships among packet/segment features.
unresolved_tensions.reason_unresolved: Overview does not indicate whether constant-valued features are intentional defaults, missing-value encodings, or valid low-variance signals; interaction with duplicated rows and derived pairs is not resolved.
